drl:
rule "R0"
salience -7
when
    T0($b0_0_0 : f1)
    accumulate(T0(f1 != -3, f0 >= $b0_0_0, $s0_1 : f0); $a0_1 : min($s0_1))
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -8
no-loop
when
    (or $p2_0 : T0(f2 == false) $p2_0 : T0(f2 == false, f0 != 5))
then
    $p2_0.setF1($p2_0.getF0());
    update($p2_0);
end
